name: godot-rust-harness
description: Runtime verification for Godot+Rust projects. Launch Godot headless, advance ticks, query entities, run invariant checks, benchmark performance.

plugins.name: godot-rust-harness
plugins.description: MCP server + Godot addon for AI-assisted runtime verification of Godot+Rust simulation projects. 16 tools including verify(), tick, snapshot, invariant checks, and benchmarking.
